description: Legacy callsite: no commit_mode in dispatch context → defaults to direct (commits via /post-fix-pipeline).

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Healer detects commit_mode is absent → falls back to direct (legacy /fix-loop / e2e-conductor pathway)
rubric_hints.output_structure: Return contract includes commit_sha (because commit happened)
rubric_hints.error_propagation: Backward compat is not an error condition
